title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent available in Claude Pro and Max plans that runs on users' computers to automate daily tasks. It can interact with files, emails, calendars, and other applications to complete complex workflows automatically, including organizing files and scheduling recurring tasks.
